flow_points: India started strong, scoring 51/2 in the Powerplay at 8.5 RR.
Netherlands' A Dutt delivered an economical spell, taking 2 wickets for 19 runs.
LV van Beek took 3 wickets for Netherlands but was expensive, conceding 57 runs.
S Dube anchored India's innings, contributing a significant 34.2% of the team's runs.
India shifted momentum with a high-scoring finish in Death Overs (RR 15.0).
Netherlands had a slower Powerplay, scoring 36/1 at 6.0 RR.
CV Varun delivered a crucial, match-defining spell, taking 3 wickets for 14 runs at an economy of 4.67.
JJ Bumrah contributed with a wicket for 17 runs in his spell.
Washington Sundar (economy 9.0) and HH Pandya (economy 13.33) had expensive bowling outings for India.
Netherlands struggled under extreme chase pressure (Index: 81.0), leading to a late-innings collapse.
